message:
feat(remote,runtime,security): refine eviction saga, idempotency, region tree, and decision receipts

- remote/eviction_saga.rs: refine eviction saga logic
- remote/idempotency.rs: refine idempotency handling
- remote/idempotency_store.rs: refine store logic
- runtime/region_tree.rs: extend region tree (+16/-8)
- security/decision_receipt.rs: extend decision receipts (+23/-12)
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
